zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏多趋势
zh.content:
当前比特币价格维持在$67507附近，较20日均线$67023略高，显示短期多头仍占优势，但涨幅有限。高低点区间$67603-$67166说明市场波动幅度较小，呈现震荡整理特征，短线趋势偏多但缺乏强劲动力。  

MACD为-179.05，表明动能仍偏弱，空头压力存在，但因信号线未提供，需关注未来交叉变化。价格稳定在均线之上，说明均线支撑有效，短期上涨可能受限于前高$67603阻力，突破后可确认延续上涨。  

支撑位方面，近期低点$67166是关键短线支撑，其下方$67023均线提供第二道支撑，可作为止损参考。阻力位在$67603及心理整数位$67800附近，若连续突破，市场多头信心将增强。  

交易策略上，可考虑区间震荡操作，低位接近$67166支撑适量建多，目标锁定前高$67603，止损略低于$67000。若价格突破阻力并伴随成交放量，可顺势追多；反之，谨防回撤风险，保持仓位控制。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
The Bitcoin market is currently showing a slight bullish momentum with the price standing at $67,507.78. Over the past 24 hours, Bitcoin has moved up by 0.46%, a moderate increase that suggests gradual upward pressure. However, the price is struggling to break past the recent high of $67,603. If it manages to surpass this resistance, we could see further price appreciation toward $68,000. On the other hand, failure to break the resistance could lead to consolidation or a pullback toward the lower support.

Support is clearly marked around the $67,000 level, which aligns with the 20-period simple moving average (SMA) at $67,023. A bounce off this region would validate the ongoing bullish trend, providing further opportunity for buyers to step in. A deeper decline below this support zone could open the door for additional downside risk toward $66,000 or lower. Traders should closely monitor this level for any signs of reversal.

The MACD shows a negative value of -179.05, indicating a bearish short-term momentum. However, without a signal line to compare, it is difficult to confirm the strength or direction of the move. Once the MACD line crosses above or below the signal line, it could provide more reliable guidance on trend continuation or reversal. In the meantime, a neutral stance may be prudent until clearer signals emerge.

For traders, the best approach is to adopt a wait-and-see strategy. Given the current market environment, those holding long positions might consider setting stop-losses near the $67,000 support level to protect against unexpected dips. Short-term traders could look for opportunities on price retracements, especially if a confirmed break above resistance occurs, offering favorable risk-to-reward setups.
